Governance catalogue — codegen'd views

The same 64 mechanisms, re-grouped live from card metadata. Every card is emitted by renderForView(card); a view is just a grouping key + order, so adding a mechanism or a view is data, not layout. Click a card for its writeup; hover for its one-line summary.  ·  the governance map  ·  catalogue

© James C. Davis, Assistant Professor, ECE @ Purdue  ·  agent-governance-mechanisms
